description: Permission management for graphics data resources

constructor.description: Initialize permission manager with default permissions

staticMethods.parseRawPermissionsToResourceMap: Parse DB permissions into resource-action map
staticMethods.mapDbActionToPermissionAction: Map DB action to internal permission action

methods.initialize: Initialize with user and project, load permissions from DB
methods.updateUserPermissions: Update user permissions for project and resource type
methods.getPermissionsByResourceType: Get permissions for specific resource type
methods.canAccess: Check if permissions include specific operation
methods.hasReadAccess: Check if user has read access to resource type
methods.hasWriteAccess: Check if user has write access to resource type
methods.hasDeleteAccess: Check if user has delete access to resource type
methods.hasFullAccess: Check if user has all permissions for resource type
methods.getResourcePermissions: Get comprehensive access permissions for all resource types
